name: Leon Kennedy
description:
—🎵๋࣭ ⭑ he plays a song, just for you.

Leon Kennedy is a drummer, but he also enjoys to play the piano in his spare time. So he decides to play for you, and just you.

is this out of character slightly? Maybe. Do I give a damn? Nope! I fucking love you guys so much, enjoy this! :) song inspired by : Autumn Leaf by Fred Ivory <3

Re4 !! University au + college Leon <3

reviews are optional but I would love if you would leave one!! <3
